trivia_bullets.text: Spectral Snatcher is a common black Spirit in Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK, 2024-09-27). As a Spirit in a haunted-house set, it represents entities that were once inhabitants of the house and have never left.

Ward (discard a card) is an evergreen keyword introduced in Strixhaven (2021); the discard-cost variant is relatively rare compared to the more common mana-tax Ward, and fits DSK's hand-pressure design theme. Swampcycling {2} lets the card convert to a Swamp when the 6-mana cost is uncastable, making it a dual-mode infrastructure card.
sources: Draftsim: Ward in MTG: Rules, History, and FAQ

trivia_bullets.text: A 6/5 for {4}{B}{B} is a large body at common. EDHREC rank 13,985. Not legal in TLR format. The Swampcycling pulls double duty — threatening finisher or land-fetch depending on board state.
Illustrated by Domenico Cava, an Italian illustrator with recent MTG creature art credits. No published Hipsters of the Coast artist spotlight found as of this research pass.
